Project analysis involves evaluating a project's feasibility, risks, and potential benefits through key steps: ==identifying objectives, conducting feasibility studies (market, technical, financial), assessing risks, and aligning with stakeholder expectations==. It ensures the project is viable before and during implementation.


**Key Steps in Project Analysis**

- **1. Project Identification and Definition:** Define the project’s purpose, scope, goals, and anticipated results.
- **3. [Stakeholder Analysis](https://www.google.com/search?q=Stakeholder+Analysis&sca_esv=9151e0e90600ee3c&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n5ohH8LbDjBelFCHY4elsfC5kUgLg%3A1774343577246&ei=mVXCaeHUDu6W4-EPkd-JwQ0&ved=2ahUKEwj0us7mmbiTAxVed2wGHeCdA5QQgK4QegQIAxAI&uact=5&oq=Steps+in+project+Analysis&gs_lp=Egxnd3Mtd2l6LXNlcnAiGVN0ZXBzIGluIHByb2plY3QgQW5hbHlzaXMyBhAAGBYYHjIGEAAYFhgeMgYQABgWGB4yBhAAGBYYHjIGEAAYFhgeMgYQABgWGB4yBhAAGBYYHjIFEAAY7wUyBRAAGO8FMggQABiABBiiBEjuH1AAWPUecAF4AZABAJgB4AGgAZEiqgEGMC4yMC40uAEDyAEA-&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfAJ5xYdo_jBC_TYn4munqmu_QoJNVjh0KIuXnSTJhVKMitxl-1C6nPYP53uJINfix46igfh232e6JQ3J8CSmswzoHWSDNH-FQFIPNG8CGwMrw3g6H8AU2JJMdWEGYfE6iWZtppGIIxceegQAPVsh6Mr-VvIES4UFhStcckwBuWUY6CnLudQQaIHzz6aJzuqUER3xWaCUyA8yHvmFgPeAjsqBJ0FuqlxN2_FixxA4G2RQ9Dsy1yBqVW0L1cOEuO7bJvPcU_aH-vpT2hefVhHB6vMDzVkLnNqC1sG1zWgmY-eSGMIDmxhtNAJi1b3vCQlzs3cTDjlPdMXtp7F5FgTZQ7Gm3QdBNUhuLLGeEoZ3cdtPF49eV63eFzaAcUJNpTygvjEhSJUbXn_JxmjsTxnYA&csui=3):** Map out everyone involved to understand their needs, influence, and expectations.
- **4. [Risk Assessment](https://www.google.com/search?q=Risk+Assessment&sca_esv=9151e0e90600ee3c&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n5ohH8LbDjBelFCHY4elsfC5kUgLg%3A1774343577246&ei=mVXCaeHUDu6W4-EPkd-JwQ0&ved=2ahUKEwj0us7mmbiTAxVed2wGHeCdA5QQgK4QegQIAxAK&uact=5&oq=Steps+in+project+Analysis&gs_lp=Egxnd3Mtd2l6LXNlcnAiGVN0ZXBzIGluIHByb2plY3QgQW5hbHlzaXMyBhAAGBYYHjIGEAAYFhgeMgYQABgWGB4yBhAAGBYYHjIGEAAYFhgeMgYQABgWGB4yBhAAGBYYHjIFEAAY7wUyBRAAGO8FMggQABiABBiiBEjuH1AAWPUecAF4AZABAJgB4AGgAZEiqgEGMC4yMC40uAEDyAEA-&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfAJ5xYdo_jBC_TYn4munqmu_QoJNVjh0KIuXnSTJhVKMitxl-1C6nPYP53uJINfix46igfh232e6JQ3J8CSmswzoHWSDNH-FQFIPNG8CGwMrw3g6H8AU2JJMdWEGYfE6iWZtppGIIxceegQAPVsh6Mr-VvIES4UFhStcckwBuWUY6CnLudQQaIHzz6aJzuqUER3xWaCUyA8yHvmFgPeAjsqBJ0FuqlxN2_FixxA4G2RQ9Dsy1yBqVW0L1cOEuO7bJvPcU_aH-vpT2hefVhHB6vMDzVkLnNqC1sG1zWgmY-eSGMIDmxhtNAJi1b3vCQlzs3cTDjlPdMXtp7F5FgTZQ7Gm3QdBNUhuLLGeEoZ3cdtPF49eV63eFzaAcUJNpTygvjEhSJUbXn_JxmjsTxnYA&csui=3):** Identify potential challenges and evaluate their likelihood and impact.
- **5. [Developing a Strategy and Plan](https://www.google.com/search?q=Developing+a+Strategy+and+Plan&sca_esv=9151e0e90600ee3c&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n5ohH8LbDjBelFCHY4elsfC5kUgLg%3A1774343577246&ei=mVXCaeHUDu6W4-EPkd-JwQ0&ved=2ahUKEwj0us7mmbiTAxVed2wGHeCdA5QQgK4QegQIAxAM&uact=5&oq=Steps+in+project+Analysis&gs_lp=Egxnd3Mtd2l6LXNlcnAiGVN0ZXBzIGluIHByb2plY3QgQW5hbHlzaXMyBhAAGBYYHjIGEAAYFhgeMgYQABgWGB4yBhAAGBYYHjIGEAAYFhgeMgYQABgWGB4yBhAAGBYYHjIFEAAY7wUyBRAAGO8FMggQABiABBiiBEjuH1AAWPUecAF4AZABAJgB4AGgAZEiqgEGMC4yMC40uAEDyAEA-&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfAJ5xYdo_jBC_TYn4munqmu_QoJNVjh0KIuXnSTJhVKMitxl-1C6nPYP53uJINfix46igfh232e6JQ3J8CSmswzoHWSDNH-FQFIPNG8CGwMrw3g6H8AU2JJMdWEGYfE6iWZtppGIIxceegQAPVsh6Mr-VvIES4UFhStcckwBuWUY6CnLudQQaIHzz6aJzuqUER3xWaCUyA8yHvmFgPeAjsqBJ0FuqlxN2_FixxA4G2RQ9Dsy1yBqVW0L1cOEuO7bJvPcU_aH-vpT2hefVhHB6vMDzVkLnNqC1sG1zWgmY-eSGMIDmxhtNAJi1b3vCQlzs3cTDjlPdMXtp7F5FgTZQ7Gm3QdBNUhuLLGeEoZ3cdtPF49eV63eFzaAcUJNpTygvjEhSJUbXn_JxmjsTxnYA&csui=3):** Create a detailed plan, including workflows and identifying the critical path.
- **6. [Go/No-Go Decision](https://www.google.com/search?q=Go%2FNo-Go+Decision&sca_esv=9151e0e90600ee3c&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n5ohH8LbDjBelFCHY4elsfC5kUgLg%3A1774343577246&ei=mVXCaeHUDu6W4-EPkd-JwQ0&ved=2ahUKEwj0us7mmbiTAxVed2wGHeCdA5QQgK4QegQIAxAP&uact=5&oq=Steps+in+project+Analysis&gs_lp=Egxnd3Mtd2l6LXNlcnAiGVN0ZXBzIGluIHByb2plY3QgQW5hbHlzaXMyBhAAGBYYHjIGEAAYFhgeMgYQABgWGB4yBhAAGBYYHjIGEAAYFhgeMgYQABgWGB4yBhAAGBYYHjIFEAAY7wUyBRAAGO8FMggQABiABBiiBEjuH1AAWPUecAF4AZABAJgB4AGgAZEiqgEGMC4yMC40uAEDyAEA-&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfAJ5xYdo_jBC_TYn4munqmu_QoJNVjh0KIuXnSTJhVKMitxl-1C6nPYP53uJINfix46igfh232e6JQ3J8CSmswzoHWSDNH-FQFIPNG8CGwMrw3g6H8AU2JJMdWEGYfE6iWZtppGIIxceegQAPVsh6Mr-VvIES4UFhStcckwBuWUY6CnLudQQaIHzz6aJzuqUER3xWaCUyA8yHvmFgPeAjsqBJ0FuqlxN2_FixxA4G2RQ9Dsy1yBqVW0L1cOEuO7bJvPcU_aH-vpT2hefVhHB6vMDzVkLnNqC1sG1zWgmY-eSGMIDmxhtNAJi1b3vCQlzs3cTDjlPdMXtp7F5FgTZQ7Gm3QdBNUhuLLGeEoZ3cdtPF49eV63eFzaAcUJNpTygvjEhSJUbXn_JxmjsTxnYA&csui=3):** Validate findings with stakeholders and decide whether to proceed
